data.content: Implementation review rejected on 2026-03-14: src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-step-failure-rollback.test.ts:273-346 is labeled as a max-iterations rollback test, but it emits a non-zero close on the initial take-loop child and never drives terminal-manager.ts:1224-1231. The required rollback coverage for the max-iterations branch remains missing.
